name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, helper, or API addition
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Lead with the use case rather than the API sketch. "I need to do X
because Y" is more useful than "please add method Z" — it lets us
explore alternatives that might be cleaner than the surface you have
in mind.

For new provider requests, use the "New provider request" template
instead — it asks for the specific information we need to scope the
implementation.
-->

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? -->

## Current workaround

<!-- How are you handling this without the feature? (Raw passthrough?
A custom HTTP client? Wrapping the existing types?) -->

## Proposed surface

<!-- A rough API sketch. We may iterate before implementation. -->

```go
// Example
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other shapes did you think about? Why does the proposed one fit best? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What is NOT being asked for? Useful to keep the proposal tightly
scoped — e.g. "this should not require breaking the existing
Provider interface". -->
